bullish: Price is above the 20 EMA on the 4H
bearish: Price is below the 20 EMA on the 4H
neutral: Price is chopping around the 20 EMA

risk_rules: Only take trades where R:R is at least 1:2
No trading in the first 15 minutes of the NY session open
If I have 2 losing trades in a row, stop for the day

options_day_trading.philosophy: Mechanical premium selling in high-IV regimes, directional spreads only when trend AND momentum align, defined risk on every trade.

public_sources_consulted.contribution: Mechanical rules: sell premium when IV rank > 50, use 45 DTE sweet spot, manage winners at 50% max credit, manage at 21 DTE, defined risk preferred, delta 16 for short strikes (~1 SD OTM).
TTM Squeeze (Bollinger Bands inside Keltner Channels) as breakout/entry trigger, combined with 8/21 EMA for trend context.
A+ setup framework, VWAP mean reversion, relative strength vs sector, opening range plays.
Prior day/week high/low as primary S/R, opening range high/low for intraday structure, VWAP as fair value anchor.
Options math education: expected move, POP calculation, vertical and iron condor mechanics.

bundled_indicators: Bollinger Bands (20, 2) — volatility regime and mean reversion
Keltner Channels (20, 1.5) — used with BB to detect TTM Squeeze
ATR (14) — expected move estimation (±1 ATR, ±2 ATR levels drawn as lines)
Prior Day High/Low (PDH/PDL) — primary intraday S/R
Info Table (top-right) — trend stack, RSI, BB %B, ATR, EM levels, squeeze state
indicator_stack.why_one_script: TradingView Basic plan limits charts to 2 indicators. Bundling everything into a single Pine Script keeps the indicator stack within that limit while preserving full functionality.

strategy_catalog.name: Earnings IV Crush — Short Iron Condor
use_when: IV rank > 50 into the event
Stock has already rallied or faded 5–15% into the print (premium is inflated)
You have no directional edge
Expected move from ATM straddle is within historical average

structure.expiration: First weekly expiration after the earnings print
structure.entry_time: Afternoon of the day BEFORE the print (max IV)
structure.exit: Close morning after print (post IV crush) or take 50% profit

strategy_catalog.sizing: Max 2% of account risk per trade; start with 1 contract
invalidation: Stock gaps beyond 1σ expected move pre-event
VIX spikes above 25 into the event

strategy_catalog.name: Earnings Directional — Put/Call Debit Spread
use_when: Strong sector momentum in one direction
Clear technical setup (EMA stack aligned, RSI confirms)
Squeeze firing before earnings
You have a conviction thesis supported by data

structure.type: Vertical debit spread (buy ATM, sell 1× EM OTM)
structure.expiration: First weekly expiration after the print
structure.entry_time: Day of print, 9:50–10:15 AM or afternoon before
structure.exit: Take 50–75% of max profit, or cut losses at 50% of debit paid

invalidation: Price moves through the short strike immediately
Squeeze fires in the opposite direction

strategy_catalog.name: SPX 0DTE Iron Condor — Range Day
use_when: VIX between 15 and 22
Range-day signals present (see Courses/SPX-0DTE-Strategy/03-Trend-vs-Range.md)
No major economic release today
Opening range has formed and is respecting both sides

structure.exit: 40% of max profit OR 2:45 PM ET hard close
structure.stop: Any short leg delta > 25 OR position price = 2x credit

strategy_catalog.sizing: Max 2% account risk; XSP for accounts under $100k

strategy_catalog.name: Squeeze Breakout — Long Call or Put Vertical
use_when: TTM Squeeze dots are red (bands compressed)
Price is above/below EMA 21 aligned with trend
RSI divergence confirms direction
Volume picking up on the compression

structure.type: Bull call spread or bear put spread
structure.entry_time: On the bar the squeeze FIRES (green triangle signal)
structure.exit: Take 50% of max profit; cut loss if EMA 21 is broken against direction

strategy_catalog.name: VWAP Mean Reversion — Short Term Debit Spread
use_when: Intraday price is 2+ ATR away from VWAP
RSI extreme (>70 or <30)
Opening range hasn't been broken decisively
No catalyst pending

structure.entry_time: When extreme stretch confirms with a reversal bar
structure.exit: Take profit at VWAP retest; stop if price makes new extreme

position_sizing_rules.graduate_to_2pct_tier_after: 10 successful live trades with positive cumulative P&L

starter_contract_sizing.NBIS_special_rule: 0.5% risk cap ($1500), paper trade 5+ times before live

stop_rules: Close ANY trade if position loses 50% of max profit potential
Close ANY short-premium trade if short-leg delta exceeds 25
Hard time stop: 2:45 PM ET for all 0DTE trades
Stop trading for the day after 2 consecutive losses
Stop for 48 hours after 3 consecutive losing days

profit_taking.scalp_spreads: Take profit at first target; do not let winners turn into losers

event_avoidance: No new trades on FOMC day before 2 PM ET
No new trades on CPI/PCE/PPI release days before 8:30 AM data is priced
No new trades on NFP Friday before 8:30 AM
No new 0DTE trades on earnings day for the underlying (switch to defined-risk event trade instead)

notes: ASML earnings the week of 2026-04-13 — verify exact date Monday. Dashboard indicator installed on ASML chart. Full briefing in vault at Trading/Research/2026-04-11-ASML-earnings-briefing.md. For SPX 0DTE plan see Trading/Research/2026-04-13-SPX-0DTE-plan.md.
